chain.expression:
$url      = add_query_arg(
			array(
				'key'      => $key,
				'oth'      => $hashed_oth,
				'endpoint' => $endpoint,
				'version'  => $version,
				'siteurl'  => admin_url(),
				'homeurl'  => home_url(),
				'redirect' => rawurldecode( base64_encode( $redirect ) ), // phpcs:ignore
				'v'        => 2,
				'php'      => phpversion(),
				'wp'       => get_bloginfo( 'version' ),
			),
			'https://upgrade.wpcode.com/'
		)
